title: Avatar and AvatarGroup for React profiles
description: Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, and AvatarGroup for user profiles, comments, and tables—sizes, motion presets, and overflow counts.

og.title: Avatar · Zentauri UI
og.description: Avatar primitives with image, fallback, optional motion, and stacked AvatarGroup overflow labels.

twitter.title: Avatar · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Avatar primitives with image, fallback, optional motion, and stacked AvatarGroup overflow labels.

intro: Avatars show who is behind an action. Pair AvatarImage with AvatarFallback for resilient loading, and AvatarGroup when several people share a surface.

faqs.question: What happens when an image fails to load?
faqs.answer: AvatarFallback renders when the image errors or while the image is still loading, with an optional delay to reduce flicker for fast caches.

faqs.question: How does AvatarGroup max work?
faqs.answer: Pass max to cap visible avatars; additional participants surface as a +N overflow chip with an aria-label describing how many remain.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Sizes map to common touch targets. Motion presets are intentionally subtle so they stay appropriate inside dense UI.
